title: Kuro’s Ambition Collapses
description: On pages 2–5, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Now you only have five of those weird claws left

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Captain Kuro! You still have one hand of "Cat's claws" left! Kill the kid!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Hey, don't call him Captain Kuro!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: His name in the village is Clahadudu... something

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Okay then, we should call him claha-san

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: After this is done, all of you must die...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: And Jango is no except- Tion...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Why do we have to die too?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I won't let you hypnotize me

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
